## VB.NET Project Guidelines

This is a VB.NET Console Application project targeting .NET 10.0.

### Development Standards

- Use VB.NET syntax and conventions
- Target .NET 10.0 framework
- Follow Microsoft VB.NET naming conventions (PascalCase for public members)
- Enable nullable reference types

### Build and Run

- Build: `dotnet build`
- Run: `dotnet run`
- Debug: Press F5 in VS Code or use `dotnet run --configuration Debug`

### Project Structure

- `Program.vb` - Main entry point
- `VBNetApp.vbproj` - Project configuration

### Recommended Extensions

- C# Dev Kit (for .NET development support)
- VS IntelliCode
